response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with consistent technical progression and strong software engineering fundamentals, the role specifically requires AI strategy expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms. The resume shows only recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure tooling (6 months at current role) rather than deep expertise in AI/ML, AI-powered product development, or strategic cloud-AI platform decisions. The lack of recognized AI products, advanced degree in AI, and evidence of strategic AI advisory work represents a critical gap for a Director-level AI Strategy principal engineer.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with 20+ years of consistent software engineering experience and clear progression to Staff-level roles
Full-stack technical breadth across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure with demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, open-source contributions)
Founded GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption (Green Map), showing product-thinking and technical vision
concerns: Minimal AI/ML expertise—only 6 months of MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure tooling; no evidence of deep machine learning, LLM strategy, or AI product development
Limited cloud platform strategy focus—AWS CDK experience is infrastructure-level, not strategic cloud product design or innovation planning
No advanced degree in AI-related field and no demonstrated recognized AI products or platforms shipped to market, both preferred qualifications

key_factors.factor: Years of experience and technical progression
Cloud-AI strategic thinking and advisory experience
